# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd service mesh configuration for Kubernetes. Set up linkerd.io/inject annotation for automatic proxy injection. Configure server and authorization policies for services. This is for our microservices communication security.
# Category: linkerd_no_mtls

apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: microservices
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
  labels:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled

---
# Frontend Service Deployment with Linkerd proxy injection
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: frontend
  namespace: microservices
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: frontend
  template:
    metadata:
      annotations:
        linkerd.io/inject: enabled
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-cpu-request: "100m"
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-memory-request: "64Mi"
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-cpu-limit: "500m"
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-memory-limit: "256Mi"
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-log-level: "warn"
        config.linkerd.io/skip-outbound-ports: "3306"
      labels:
        app: frontend
        version: v1
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: frontend-sa
      containers:
        - name: frontend
          image: frontend-service:latest
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8080
              name: http
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "100m"
              memory: "128Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "500m"
              memory: "512Mi"
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /health
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /health
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 15

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: frontend
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  selector:
    app: frontend
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: 80
      targetPort: 8080
      protocol: TCP

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: frontend-sa
  namespace: microservices

---
# Backend API Service Deployment
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: backend-api
  namespace: microservices
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: backend-api
  template:
    metadata:
      annotations:
        linkerd.io/inject: enabled
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-cpu-request: "150m"
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-memory-request: "128Mi"
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-cpu-limit: "1"
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-memory-limit: "512Mi"
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-log-level: "warn"
        config.linkerd.io/opaque-ports: "3306,6379"
      labels:
        app: backend-api
        version: v1
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: backend-api-sa
      containers:
        - name: backend-api
          image: backend-api-service:latest
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8081
              name: http
            - containerPort: 9090
              name: grpc
          env:
            - name: DATABASE_HOST
              value: "database.microservices.svc.cluster.local"
            - name: CACHE_HOST
              value: "cache.microservices.svc.cluster.local"
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "200m"
              memory: "256Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "1"
              memory: "1Gi"
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /ready
              port: 8081
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /health
              port: 8081
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 15

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: backend-api
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  selector:
    app: backend-api
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: 80
      targetPort: 8081
      protocol: TCP
    - name: grpc
      port: 9090
      targetPort: 9090
      protocol: TCP

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: backend-api-sa
  namespace: microservices

---
# Orders Service Deployment
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: orders-service
  namespace: microservices
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: orders-service
  template:
    metadata:
      annotations:
        linkerd.io/inject: enabled
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-cpu-request: "100m"
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-memory-request: "64Mi"
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-log-level: "info"
      labels:
        app: orders-service
        version: v1
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: orders-service-sa
      containers:
        - name: orders-service
          image: orders-service:latest
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8082
              name: http
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "150m"
              memory: "256Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "500m"
              memory: "512Mi"

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: orders-service
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  selector:
    app: orders-service
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: 80
      targetPort: 8082
      protocol: TCP

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: orders-service-sa
  namespace: microservices

---
# Payments Service Deployment
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: payments-service
  namespace: microservices
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: payments-service
  template:
    metadata:
      annotations:
        linkerd.io/inject: enabled
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-cpu-request: "100m"
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-memory-request: "64Mi"
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-log-level: "info"
      labels:
        app: payments-service
        version: v1
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: payments-service-sa
      containers:
        - name: payments-service
          image: payments-service:latest
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8083
              name: http
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "150m"
              memory: "256Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "500m"
              memory: "512Mi"

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: payments-service
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  selector:
    app: payments-service
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: 80
      targetPort: 8083
      protocol: TCP

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: payments-service-sa
  namespace: microservices

---
# ======================================================
# Server Policies - Define which ports are exposed and how
# ======================================================

# Server policy for frontend service
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: frontend-http
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: frontend
  port: http
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2

---
# Server policy for backend-api HTTP
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: backend-api-http
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: backend-api
  port: http
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2

---
# Server policy for backend-api gRPC
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: backend-api-grpc
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: backend-api
  port: grpc
  proxyProtocol: gRPC

---
# Server policy for orders-service
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: orders-service-http
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: orders-service
  port: http
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2

---
# Server policy for payments-service
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: payments-service-http
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: payments-service
  port: http
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2

---
# ======================================================
# ServerAuthorization Policies - Control service-to-service access
# ======================================================

# Allow frontend to access backend-api HTTP
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: frontend-to-backend-api-http
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  server:
    name: backend-api-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: frontend-sa
          namespace: microservices

---
# Allow frontend to access backend-api gRPC
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: frontend-to-backend-api-grpc
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  server:
    name: backend-api-grpc
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: frontend-sa
          namespace: microservices

---
# Allow backend-api to access orders-service
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: backend-to-orders
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  server:
    name: orders-service-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: backend-api-sa
          namespace: microservices

---
# Allow backend-api to access payments-service
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: backend-to-payments
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  server:
    name: payments-service-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: backend-api-sa
          namespace: microservices

---
# Allow orders-service to access payments-service
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: orders-to-payments
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  server:
    name: payments-service-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: orders-service-sa
          namespace: microservices

---
# Allow health check probes from kubelet (unauthenticated)
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: allow-health-probes-frontend
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  server:
    name: frontend-http
  client:
    unauthenticated: true
    networks:
      - cidr: "10.0.0.0/8"

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: allow-health-probes-backend
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  server:
    name: backend-api-http
  client:
    unauthenticated: true
    networks:
      - cidr: "10.0.0.0/8"

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: allow-health-probes-orders
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  server:
    name: orders-service-http
  client:
    unauthenticated: true
    networks:
      - cidr: "10.0.0.0/8"

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: allow-health-probes-payments
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  server:
    name: payments-service-http
  client:
    unauthenticated: true
    networks:
      - cidr: "10.0.0.0/8"

---
# ======================================================
# HTTPRoute-based Authorization Policies (Linkerd 2.13+)
# Fine-grained path/method based authorization
# ======================================================

# Define HTTPRoute for backend-api
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: HTTPRoute
metadata:
  name: backend-api-routes
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  parentRefs:
    - name: backend-api-http
      kind: Server
      group: policy.linkerd.io
  rules:
    - matches:
        - path:
            value: /api/v1/orders
            type: PathPrefix
          method: GET
    - matches:
        - path:
            value: /api/v1/orders
            type: PathPrefix
          method: POST
    - matches:
        - path:
            value: /api/v1/payments
            type: PathPrefix
          method: GET
    - matches:
        - path:
            value: /api/v1/payments
            type: PathPrefix
          method: POST
    - matches:
        - path:
            value: /health
            type: Exact
          method: GET
    - matches:
        - path:
            value: /ready
            type: Exact
          method: GET

---
# Define HTTPRoute for orders-service
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: HTTPRoute
metadata:
  name: orders-service-routes
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  parentRefs:
    - name: orders-service-http
      kind: Server
      group: policy.linkerd.io
  rules:
    - matches:
        - path:
            value: /orders
            type: PathPrefix
          method: GET
    - matches:
        - path:
            value: /orders
            type: PathPrefix
          method: POST
    - matches:
        - path:
            value: /orders
            type: PathPrefix
          method: PUT

---
# Define HTTPRoute for payments-service
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: HTTPRoute
metadata:
  name: payments-service-routes
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  parentRefs:
    - name: payments-service-http
      kind: Server
      group: policy.linkerd.io
  rules:
    - matches:
        - path:
            value: /payments
            type: PathPrefix
          method: GET
    - matches:
        - path:
            value: /payments
            type: PathPrefix
          method: POST

---
# Authorization policy for backend-api routes - only frontend allowed
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: backend-api-authz
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: HTTPRoute
    name: backend-api-routes
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: frontend-identity
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io

---
# Authorization policy for orders-service routes - only backend-api allowed
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: orders-service-authz
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: HTTPRoute
    name: orders-service-routes
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: backend-api-identity
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io

---
# Authorization policy for payments-service routes - backend-api and orders allowed
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: payments-service-authz
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: HTTPRoute
    name: payments-service-routes
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: backend-and-orders-identity
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io

---
# ======================================================
# MeshTLSAuthentication - Define trusted identities
# ======================================================

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
metadata:
  name: frontend-identity
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  identities:
    - "frontend-sa.microservices.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local"

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
metadata:
  name: backend-api-identity
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  identities:
    - "backend-api-sa.microservices.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local"

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
metadata:
  name: backend-and-orders-identity
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  identities:
    - "backend-api-sa.microservices.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local"
    - "orders-service-sa.microservices.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local"

---
# ======================================================
# Network Policies for additional defense-in-depth
# ======================================================

apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: default-deny-all
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector: {}
  policyTypes:
    - Ingress
    - Egress

---
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-frontend-ingress
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: frontend
  policyTypes:
    - Ingress
    - Egress
  ingress:
    - ports:
        - port: 8080
          protocol: TCP
        - port: 4143
          protocol: TCP
  egress:
    - to:
        - podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app: backend-api
      ports:
        - port: 8081
          protocol: TCP
        - port: 9090
          protocol: TCP
        - port: 4143
          protocol: TCP
    - to:
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              kubernetes.io/metadata.name: linkerd
      ports:
        - port: 8443
          protocol: TCP
    - ports:
        - port: 53
          protocol: UDP
        - port: 53
          protocol: TCP

---
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-backend-api-traffic
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: backend-api
  policyTypes:
    - Ingress
    - Egress
  ingress:
    - from:
        - podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app: frontend
      ports:
        - port: 8081
          protocol: TCP
        - port: 9090
          protocol: TCP
        - port: 4143
          protocol: TCP
  egress:
    - to:
        - podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app: orders-service
      ports:
        - port: 8082
          protocol: TCP
        - port: 4143
          protocol: TCP
    - to:
        - podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app: payments-service
      ports:
        - port: 8083
          protocol: TCP
        - port: 4143
          protocol: TCP
    - to:
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              kubernetes.io/metadata.name: linkerd
      ports:
        - port: 8443
          protocol: TCP
    - ports:
        - port: 53
          protocol: UDP
        - port: 53
          protocol: TCP

---
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-orders-service-traffic
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: orders-service
  policyTypes:
    - Ingress
    - Egress
  ingress:
    - from:
        - podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app: backend-api
      ports:
        - port: 8082
          protocol: TCP
        - port: 4143
          protocol: TCP
  egress:
    - to:
        - podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app: payments-service
      ports:
        - port: 8083
          protocol: TCP
        - port: 4143
          protocol: TCP
    - to:
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              kubernetes.io/metadata.name: linkerd
      ports:
        - port: 8443
          protocol: TCP
    - ports:
        - port: 53
          protocol: UDP
        - port: 53
          protocol: TCP

---
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-payments-service-traffic
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: payments-service
  policyTypes:
    - Ingress
    - Egress
  ingress:
    - from:
        - podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app: backend-api
        - podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app: orders-service
      ports:
        - port: 8083
          protocol: TCP
        - port: 4143
          protocol: TCP
  egress:
    - to:
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              kubernetes.io/metadata.name: linkerd
      ports:
        - port: 8443
          protocol: TCP
    - ports:
        - port: 53
          protocol: UDP
        - port: 53
          protocol: TCP

---
# ======================================================
# Service Profiles for retries, timeouts, and route metrics
# ======================================================

apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServiceProfile
metadata:
  name: backend-api.microservices.svc.cluster.local
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  routes:
    - name: GET /api/v1/orders
      condition:
        method: GET
        pathRegex: /api/v1/orders(/.*)?
      isRetryable: true
      timeout: 5s
    - name: POST /api/v1/orders
      condition:
        method: POST
        pathRegex: /api/v1/orders
      isRetryable: false
      timeout: 10s
    - name: GET /api/v1/payments
      condition:
        method: GET
        pathRegex: /api/v1/payments(/.*)?
      isRetryable: true
      timeout: 5s
    - name: POST /api/v1/payments
      condition:
        method: POST
        pathRegex: /api/v1/payments
      isRetryable: false
      timeout: 15s
    - name: GET /health
      condition:
        method: GET
        pathRegex: /health
      isRetryable: true
      timeout: 2s
  retryBudget:
    retryRatio: 0.2
    minRetriesPerSecond: 10
    ttl: 10s

---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServiceProfile
metadata:
  name: orders-service.microservices.svc.cluster.local
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  routes:
    - name: GET /orders
      condition:
        method: GET
        pathRegex: /orders(/.*)?
      isRetryable: true
      timeout: 5s
    - name: POST /orders
      condition:
        method: POST
        pathRegex: /orders
      isRetryable: false
      timeout: 10s
    - name: PUT /orders
      condition:
        method: PUT
        pathRegex: /orders/[^/]+
      isRetryable: false
      timeout: 10s
  retryBudget:
    retryRatio: 0.2
    minRetriesPerSecond: 10
    ttl: 10s

---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServiceProfile
metadata:
  name: payments-service.microservices.svc.cluster.local
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  routes:
    - name: GET /payments
      condition:
        method: GET
        pathRegex: /payments(/.*)?
      isRetryable: true
      timeout: 5s
    - name: POST /payments
      condition:
        method: POST
        pathRegex: /payments
      isRetryable: false
      timeout: 20s
  retryBudget:
    retryRatio: 0.1
    minRetriesPerSecond: 5
    ttl: 10s
